headline: Simple pricing. No per-seat fees. No surprises.
subheadline: Two plans built for growing construction companies. Same power, different scale.
plans.pro.name: Pro
plans.pro.tagline: For crews focused on field operations
plans.business.name: Business
plans.business.tagline: For builders who want the full ERP in one place
enterprise.headline: More than 40 employees, or need SSO, on-prem or custom integrations?
enterprise.body: Let's talk. We'll design a plan tailored to your operation.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.0.a: Yes — 14 days free, card required. Cancel any time during the trial at no charge.
faq.1.a: Pro $499 USD, Business $999 USD — one-time. Includes onboarding, training and data migration.
faq.2.a: Yes. Upgrade any time (effective immediately, prorated). Downgrade at the end of your billing cycle.
faq.3.q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.3.a: Credit card (Visa, Mastercard, Amex) and ACH for annual customers.
faq.4.a: Not for monthly. Annual is billed up-front, but you can cancel renewal at any time.
faq.5.q: What if we exceed the included users?
faq.5.a: We notify you before you go over and help you evaluate whether Business or Enterprise makes more sense.
